project.name: RAGFlow
project.stack: Flask backend, React/TypeScript frontend (UmiJS, Ant Design), Docker Compose, MySQL, Elasticsearch/Infinity, Redis, MinIO; iOS: SwiftUI, GRDB, EPUBKit, PDFKit, Accelerate, marmelroy/Zip

completed: Phase 1–4: All previously complete (P1.1–P1.6, P2, P2.5, iOS live testing phases 1–4)
Phase 6 DONE — WorkflowRunner + 5 templates + full UI
Session 2026-03-25: Bug fixes and feature additions from user testing feedback (commits up to 54bfaf3)
— MultiDocImportTests (commit eb731a7): 6 new XCTests covering batch import loop,
partial-failure isolation, progress messages, KB scoping, 10-file batches
RAGFlowMobileApp.init(): registers BGTaskScheduler handlers before first scene connects
ChatViewModel.send(): 30-second background fence wrapping entire stream Task
Info.plist: BGTaskSchedulerPermittedIdentifiers declared for both task IDs
BACKGROUND_PROCESSING.md: spec doc with design rationale and scenario table
next_steps: — P7.1: Fresh install wipe test end-to-end on real device
— Set DEVELOPMENT_TEAM in Xcode Signing & Capabilities for real-device deployment
— Test BGContinuedProcessingTask on real iOS 26 device (not simulatable)
— TestFlight: Archive → Distribute → App Store Connect
— Background GPU entitlement for on-device embedding (iOS 26, sparse hardware support)
— Add Categorize step type (branching — requires design beyond linear model)
— Add WorkflowTemplates using rewrite/webSearch step types
— Brave Search API key entry in SettingsView (currently keychain only, no UI field)
— Investigate Deep Summarizer 'Failed' status (root cause uninvestigated)
— Local notification when BGContinuedProcessingTask completes while app is backgrounded

phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase1: COMPLETE — ATS plist, AppIcon asset catalog, PBXResourcesBuildPhase
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase2: COMPLETE — API guards, provider banner, Settings accessible, debug helpers
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase3: COMPLETE — chat history persisted to SQLite (messages + message_sources)
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase4: COMPLETE — ingest off main thread, scan-once guard, phase progress labels
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase5_formats: COMPLETE — DOCX/XLSX/PPTX via Zip, EML pure Swift
phase_status.iOS_live_testing_phase7_hardening: MOSTLY COMPLETE (P7.2/P7.3/P7.4 done; P7.1 real-device test pending)
phase_status.iOS_bug_fixes_2026-03-25: COMPLETE — PDF import, chat persistence, clear chat, suggested prompts, import button
phase_status.iOS_landscape_QA_2026-03-25: COMPLETE — all fixes verified on iPad Pro 13-inch M5 iOS 26.4 landscape
phase_status.iOS_workflow_editor_2026-03-25: COMPLETE — WorkflowEditorView + 3 new step types, commit 54bfaf3
phase_status.iOS_background_processing_2026-03-27: COMPLETE — BGContinuedProcessingTask + UIKit fence, commit 99cb1ca, tag AfterBackgroundProcessing

known_gaps.code_signing: DEVELOPMENT_TEAM not set — user must configure in Xcode for real device
known_gaps.workflow_failed: Deep Summarizer shown as 'Failed' in user screenshot — root cause uninvestigated
known_gaps.brave_search_ui: Brave Search API key has no Settings UI field — stored in keychain only
known_gaps.workflow_categorize: Categorize/Switch step types not yet implemented — requires branching design beyond linear model
known_gaps.bg_task_simulator: BGContinuedProcessingTask cannot be triggered in the iOS Simulator — real device required for end-to-end test
known_gaps.streaming_background: LLM streaming (URLSession DataTask) cannot use background URLSession — 30s fence is best achievable; verified expected OS limitation

last_commit.message: Feat(iOS): background processing — BGContinuedProcessingTask (iOS 26) + UIKit fence
